text: Pre-existing conditions are fully covered with no exclusions — just declare them on your application.
subclaims: There are no exclusions for pre-existing conditions.
You must declare pre-existing conditions on your application.

text: Mental health is covered up to $1,000 for any mental health treatment abroad.
subclaims: The mental health coverage limit is $1,000.
Any type of mental health treatment abroad is covered.

text: Skiing and bungee jumping are included at no extra cost.
subclaims: These activities have no additional premium.

text: Skydiving and extreme sports are also covered under the adventure activities section.
There are no geographic restrictions on where overseas medical treatment is received.
subclaims: Overseas medical treatment has no geographic restrictions.
